Describe the key cooking steps shown in the video sequence.
canonical_answer: At 8s, hands hold a small bowl over a pot containing melting butter; at 10s, a fork scrapes peanut butter paste into the metal pot; at 12s, a wooden spoon stirs the ingredients into a smooth glossy liquid; at 16s, a hand drops white marshmallows into the brown mixture.

question: Outline the visible actions performed on the ingredients throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a hand grasps a chocolate-drizzled cereal bar on a wooden board; at 10s, a fork scrapes brown paste into a pot with a yellow butter cube; at 12s, a wooden utensil stirs the contents into a swirling liquid; at 16s, white cylindrical marshmallows fall into the silver pot.
